U.GetQuestForLevel(h)local Y,d=nil,-550784+550784 for U,T in pairs(U[tG[BG("Y$\240\150\001\207 \019\204",833664+18180595730304)]])do if h>=U and U>d then d=U Y=T end end return Y end;(getgenv())[tG[BG("\157d\240\b\241\133#\252\249",3629246502016-(-863104))]]=U local h={}local Y=game:GetService(tG[BG("\207\002[\252\253\248$\019\230_\231!F\003\226F\226",-741056+29141353844416)])local d=game:GetService(tG[BG("\206\027\182\024\142\r\001",(21380348118528-(649728-(-24448)))-244864)])local T=game:GetService(tG[BG("Q\024\003\211\b\253\240g\002",24005646513472-(1566592-1012288))])local D=game:GetService(tG[BG("\193,\253\172\249\223\230u\216)%\018\b\198s\140P",-536896+31285616062784)])local J=game:GetService(tG[BG("\210\017n\000d\133\018\012y\163\250\247",16463683591232-203840)])local u=game:GetService(tG[BG("\212\189I\002\001\236\003\181\028\002\139",(-764160-(-62720))+5570573284352)])local N=game:GetService(tG[BG("\208#zq\178\r\004\210\182b",8182985630976-(-809728))])local e=game:GetService(tG[BG("\189,\000\249\227\018^\228\v\218\002",28057947211456-(-391488))])local g=tG[BG("\212\238M\b\133\136-\237",-227520+19967303186624)]local P=tG[BG("`\130\015\000\240\181\249\012\203<\242\203\145",30977452257280-634880)]local o=g..(tG[BG("V",((18339509037248-19904)-(-1012608))-(-291008+-32960))]..P)if makefolder and not isfolder(g)then makefolder(g)end _G[tG[BG("\210>\253\b\223\004\173\239\030\029\018|",319872+485330984576)]]={}local function f()if writefile then local U,h=pcall(function()return e:JSONEncode(_G[tG[BG("\212\025\153\b\223\014\210\255\223\006\014\r",109888+11606075265728)]])end)if U then writefile(o,h)end end end local function H()if isfile and isfile(o)then local U=readfile(o)local h,Y=pcall(function()return e:JSONDecode(U)end)if h and type(Y)==tG[BG("\242\212\209\n\177",13533441429504-(998784+-1518976))]then _G[tG[BG("\212\183+\b\252N\021\236\223\239\006\r",68928+(-640064+19655918401280))]]=Y end end end local function S(U,h)if _G[tG[BG("T\025\247\028\223\014\168O\223\006\182\253",16889958414208-(334912+-812224))]][U]~=nil then return _G[tG[BG("T\025\253s\217{U\239\164\157\019\145",17945447563200-458688)]][U]end return h end H()local w=d[tG[BG("\202!\164\254\132\228\028\243\024\191\161",5773508905664-(-881984))]]repeat task[tG[BG("\017\234\b\b",(-374464+851840)+(-579648+3180423384960))]]()until Y:FindFirstChild(tG[BG("\208\169\224\002\152\153\014",27596238667648-49024)])and Y[tG[BG("\216\147\b\255\005\241\150",105280+12998718416064)]]:FindFirstChild(tG[BG("\137,\254\255\217\244",30149596587904-(-88192))])local Q=w[tG[BG("&\029\019\245",424704+15306189276416)]]and(w[tG[BG("\189q\019\237",27165667098944-(-1048256))]][tG[BG("\208\015D\002",(-86656+877568)+16467977563776)]]and w[tG[BG("\194\029\012A",-793728+34999689288832)]][tG[BG("\208\015\245\226",927744+30376155273216)]][tG[BG("j\147\v\t\240",18786186465216-(-487488))]])or
